original_prompt: make this on the next line not wrapped around the logo
rephrased_goal: Modify the sidebar header HTML so the application name drops to a new line below the logo image instead of rendering inline alongside it.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Change layout of logo and text inside the h5 in the sidebar
subtasks_required: Replace 'me-2' class with 'd-block mb-2' on the logo img tag
Adjust logo size to 32px since it is now on its own row
Adjust font-size of text so it pairs well below the logo
tasks.testing_criteria: Logo has display:block forcing span to next line.
